name: JS: Handy Snippets

Rust: Handy Snippets
SQL: Window Functions
body:
-- Rank employees by salary within each department
SELECT
  name,
  department,
  salary,
  RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY department
    ORDER BY salary DESC
  ) AS rank
FROM employees;

-- Running total
SELECT
  order_date,
  amount,
  SUM(amount) OVER (
    ORDER BY order_date
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS running_total
FROM orders;
